# FlareMo

FlareMo 是 Cloudflare 原生的个人知识管理系统，提供 Memos 兼容 API 子集。

## 必读

- README: ./README.md
- 技术栈: ./docs/tech-stack.md
- 架构: ./docs/architecture-notes.md
- 部署: ./docs/deploy.md
- Agent 部署: ./docs/agent-deploy.md
- 发版: ./docs/release.md
- 维护: ./docs/maintenance.md
- Memos 兼容矩阵: ./docs/memos-compatibility.md
- Memos 生态兼容记录: ./docs/memos-ecosystem.md
- English README: ./README.en.md
- English deploy docs: ./docs/en/deploy.md
- 路线: ./ROADMAP.md
- Agent 指南: ./AGENTS.md

## 关键事实

- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers
- Web: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/radix primitives
- Database: Cloudflare D1 + Drizzle
- Object storage: Cloudflare R2
- Auth boundary: Cloudflare Access
- Public API: Memos-compatible `/api/v1/*`
- App API: `/api/app/*`

## 质量门禁

```bash
pnpm format:check
pnpm verify
pnpm deploy:dry-run
pnpm backup:drill
```

项目不使用 GitHub Actions 作为 CI。发布前必须在本地完成质量门禁。
